name: comath-codex
description: Repo-local AI co-mathematician scaffold for hard-gated mathematical research workflows.

interface.longDescription: Comath Codex packages a repo-local AI co-mathematician workflow with project briefs, goals, workstreams, proof/computation/literature/reviewer workers, claim registry updates, working-paper synthesis, and hard-gated promotion.
defaultPrompt: Use $comath-codex to run a hard-gated research cycle.
